'''Basso''' and his older brother [[Jiir]] were members of the [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] resistance just before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was on a mercy mission on Ralltiir, Basso was tasked to deliver a message he had absorbed under [[Hypno-imprinting|hypnotic imprint]]. The resistance created a diversion so that Basso could get past [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. They succeeded to draw the Imperial's attention, but all their cell was killed including his brother. He was wounded, and taken aboard the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] and put in a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] tank. Shortly thereafter, he advised Leia about the [[Battle of Kattada]].

He later participated in the [[Battle of Kalist VI]], posing as imperial stormtrooper, where he helped to convince the other [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to free the slaves.

Alongside [[Able]] and other Rebel operatives, he participated in the [[Raid on an Imperial cargo convoy|Battle of Per Lupelo]]. Basso was part of the teams used to board and capture four Imperial ships carrying supplies badly needed by the Rebels.

After ''[[Rebel One]]''{{'s}} [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] malfunctioned and landed the ship at [[Bannistar Station]], Basso was a part of the mission that decided to destroy the Station, facing odds that were almost guaranteed to be fatal. Basso was tasked with leading a team to destroy the communications array and to try to find some method for the Rebels to escape. His team was annihilated, but he managed to steal a imperial shuttle, which later allowed all surviving rebels to escape. 

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
An action figure was made in 2008 by Hasbro as a part of their Expanded Universe Comics line.<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=#15: Mouse & Basso (''Empire'' #37)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/taccomicpacks15.asp}}</ref>
